## 🎯 Work Preferences

### Communication Style

| Preference | Setting |
|------------|---------|
| **Language** | Hinglish (70% Hindi + 30% English) |
| **Tone** | Professional, friendly, direct |
| **Detail Level** | Concise, actionable |
| **Response Format** | Structured with tables/bullets |
| **Emoji Usage** | Moderate, contextual |

### Working Hours

| Day | Active Hours | Quiet Hours |
|-----|--------------|-------------|
| **Mon-Fri** | 09:00-22:00 IST | 23:00-08:00 IST |
| **Sat-Sun** | Flexible | 23:00-10:00 IST |

### Notification Preferences

| Type | Preference |
|------|------------|
| **Critical Errors** | ✅ Immediate alert |
| **Task Completion** | ✅ Summary at end |
| **Progress Updates** | ⚠️ Only if delayed |
| **Background Tasks** | ❌ Silent (log only) |

## 🛠️ Tool Preferences

### AI Providers

| Provider | Priority | Use Case |
|----------|----------|----------|
| **Gemini** | 1st (Free tier) | General coding, explanations |
| **Qwen** | 2nd | Code generation, refactoring |
| **ChatGPT** | 3rd | Complex reasoning |
| **OpenRouter** | 4th | Model variety |
| **GitHub Copilot** | 5th | IDE integration |

### CLI Commands (Most Used)

```bash
jarvis auth login          # Switch providers
jarvis code explain        # Understand code
jarvis git commit          # Quick commits
jarvis search              # Find code
jarvis plugins list        # Manage extensions
```

### Git Workflow

| Operation | Preference |
|-----------|------------|
| **Commit Style** | Conventional Commits |
| **Branch Naming** | `feature/`, `fix/`, `docs/` |
| **PR Reviews** | Detailed, constructive |
| **Merge Strategy** | Squash and merge |

## 🎯 Project Preferences

### Documentation Standards

| Aspect | Requirement |
|--------|-------------|
| **Format** | Markdown with tables |
| **Structure** | Hierarchical (H1 → H4) |
| **Examples** | Always include code snippets |
| **Tone** | Professional yet approachable |
| **Language** | English (technical), Hinglish (casual) |

### Code Quality

| Standard | Expectation |
|----------|-------------|
| **Type Safety** | TypeScript strict mode |
| **Testing** | Unit + Integration tests |
| **Linting** | ESLint, Prettier |
| **Documentation** | JSDoc for public APIs |
| **Error Handling** | Try-catch with meaningful messages |

### Project Structure

```
project/
├── src/           # Source code
├── docs/          # Documentation
├── tests/         # Test files
├── scripts/       # Build/deploy scripts
├── package.json   # Dependencies
└── README.md      # Main documentation
```

---

## 🔐 Security & Privacy

### Data Handling

| Data Type | Policy |
|-----------|--------|
| **API Keys** | Never log, encrypt storage |
| **Personal Info** | Keep local, no external sharing |
| **Code Projects** | Private by default, public when ready |
| **Conversation Logs** | Local storage only |

### Permission Levels

| Action | Permission Required |
|--------|---------------------|
| Read files in workspace | ✅ Auto-approved |
| Write files in workspace | ✅ Auto-approved |
| Execute commands | ✅ Auto-approved (safe list) |
| Delete files | ⚠️ Explicit confirmation |
| External API calls | ⚠️ Explicit confirmation |
| Install packages | ✅ Auto-approved (npm/pip) |

---

### Daily Goals

|--------|--------|

| **Commits** | 3-5 per day |

### Weekly Review

**Every Sunday:**
- Review completed tasks
- Plan next week's goals
- Update long-term memory
- Clean up workspace

## 🎁 Special Preferences

### Pet Peeves (Avoid These)

❌ Pure English responses (prefer Hinglish)  
❌ Long paragraphs without structure  
❌ Unnecessary verbosity  
❌ Repeating information  
❌ Asking for things already confirmed  

### Love When

✅ Structured responses with tables  
✅ Actionable next steps  
✅ Hinglish communication  
✅ Emoji usage (contextual)  
✅ Proactive suggestions  
✅ Iron Man / Jarvis references
